title: podman does not support COPY --link
body:
### Issue Description

The [COPY --link](https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/builder/#copy---link) flag causes an error when used in a Dockerfile.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```
$ cat Dockerfile
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
FROM alpine
COPY --link /bin/ls /bin/ls2

$ podman build .
```


### Describe the results you received

```
STEP 2/2: COPY --link /bin/ls /bin/ls2
Error: building at STEP "COPY --link /bin/ls /bin/ls2": COPY only supports the --chmod=<permissions> --chown=<uid:gid> and the --from=<image|stage> flags
```

### Describe the results you expected

Build succeeds.

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out!  This is already being tracked in https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4325, so I am closing this one here as duplicate.
